slides.title: Plan B 🛡️
slides.content: What if the `if` condition fails? We can use `else` as our fallback backup plan.

slides.title: Using Else
slides.content: If it's not greater than 50, do this instead:

quizData.question: When does the `else` block execute?
quizData.explanation: `else` is the backup plan when `if` is false.

slides.title: Multiple checks
